# www.northern-borealis.com

> Find and book the best Northern Lights tours in Europe. Compare hand-picked tours in Norway, Iceland, Finland & Sweden by budget, group size & experience.

## Home

[Best Northern Lights Tours in Europe (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/): Find and book the best Northern Lights tours in Europe. Compare hand-picked tours in Norway, Iceland, Finland & Sweden by budget, group size & experience.

## Destinations

[Northern Lights in Finland — Aurora Borealis Tours in Lapland (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/destinations/finland/): Everything you need to plan a Northern Lights trip to Finland. Discover Lapland, Rovaniemi and Santa Claus Village, the best time to travel, and the top aurora borealis tours in Finland.
[Northern Lights Tours in Iceland (2026 / 2027): Best Places, Times & Tours | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/destinations/iceland/): Everything you need to plan Northern Lights tours in Iceland: the best places and times to see the aurora borealis over Iceland, plus tours from Reykjavik and Akureyri.
[Northern Lights Tours in Norway (2026 / 2027): Best Places, Times & Cities | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/destinations/norway/): The best Northern Lights tours in Norway — Tromsø, Alta, Svolvær and Svalbard compared. Find the best places and best time to see the aurora borealis in Norway.
[Best Places to See the Northern Lights in Sweden (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/destinations/sweden/): Sweden is home to Abisko — widely considered the single best place to see the northern lights in Europe. Find out where, when and how to see the aurora borealis in Swedish Lapland.
[Best Northern Lights Tours by Destination (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/destinations/): Compare the best Northern Lights tours by destination. Hand-picked, ranked aurora tours in Iceland, Norway, Sweden and Finland — pick your country and find the right tour.
[Best Northern Lights Tours by Destination (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/destinations/#destinations): Compare the best Northern Lights tours by destination. Hand-picked, ranked aurora tours in Iceland, Norway, Sweden and Finland — pick your country and find the right tour.
[Northern Lights Tours in Norway (2026 / 2027): Best Places, Times & Cities | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/destinations/norway/#cities): The best Northern Lights tours in Norway — Tromsø, Alta, Svolvær and Svalbard compared. Find the best places and best time to see the aurora borealis in Norway.
[Best Places to See the Northern Lights in Sweden (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/destinations/sweden/#cities): Sweden is home to Abisko — widely considered the single best place to see the northern lights in Europe. Find out where, when and how to see the aurora borealis in Swedish Lapland.
[Northern Lights Tours in Iceland (2026 / 2027): Best Places, Times & Tours | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/destinations/iceland/#cities): Everything you need to plan Northern Lights tours in Iceland: the best places and times to see the aurora borealis over Iceland, plus tours from Reykjavik and Akureyri.

## Guides

A month-by-month guide covering every major destination — Norway, Iceland, Sweden and Finland — so you can plan the perfect trip.
[Northern Lights Guides & Tips | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/guides/): Expert guides to help you plan your Northern Lights trip. Discover the best time to go, the best places to visit, and how to chase the aurora borealis.
[Best Places to See the Northern Lights (2026 / 2027) — Where to Watch the Aurora | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/guides/best-places-to-see-northern-lights/): Where are the best places to see the northern lights? We rank every major aurora destination — Norway, Iceland, Sweden, Finland and more — so you can find the best spot for your trip.
[What Are the Northern Lights? What Creates the Aurora Borealis | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/guides/what-are-the-northern-lights/): What are the northern lights, what creates them, and why do they appear in different colours? A complete guide to the science, facts and names behind the aurora borealis.
[How to See the Northern Lights (2026 / 2027) — Complete Guide | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/guides/how-to-see-the-northern-lights/): How to see the northern lights — everything you need to know. Where to go, when to go, how to read aurora forecasts, and whether to book a guided tour or go it alone.

[What Are the Northern Lights? ## Tours

[Best Northern Lights Tours in Europe (2026 / 2027) — Compared by City | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/): The best Northern Lights tours in Europe, compared city by city. Aurora borealis tours and excursions in Norway, Sweden, Finland and Iceland — hand-picked and ranked.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Europe (2026 / 2027) — Compared by City | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/#norway): The best Northern Lights tours in Europe, compared city by city. Aurora borealis tours and excursions in Norway, Sweden, Finland and Iceland — hand-picked and ranked.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Tromsø (2026 / 2027) — Compared & Ranked | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/tromso-northern-lights-tour/): The best Northern Lights tours in Tromsø, compared and ranked. Small-group chases, photography tours and luxury cruises — hand-picked by travellers who've done them.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Svalbard & Longyearbyen (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/svalbard-northern-lights-tour/): The best Northern Lights tours in Svalbard, Norway. Photography, private car and snowmobile tours from Longyearbyen on the Spitsbergen archipelago — compared and ranked.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Svolvær, Norway (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/svolvaer-northern-lights-tour/): The best Northern Lights tours in Svolvær, Norway. Small-group hunts, photography tours and private aurora experiences in the Lofoten Islands — compared and ranked.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Abisko, Sweden (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/abisko-northern-lights-tour/): The best Northern Lights tours in Abisko, Sweden. Aurora chases, snowmobile adventures and Sami cultural tours in Abisko National Park — compared and ranked.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Akureyri, Iceland (2026 / 2027) — Compared & Ranked | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/akureyri-northern-lights-tour/): The best Northern Lights tours in Akureyri, Iceland — compared and ranked. Fewer crowds, darker skies and a dedicated photography tour, away from Reykjavik's busy routes.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Kiruna, Sweden (2026 / 2027) | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/kiruna-northern-lights-tour/): The best Northern Lights tours in Kiruna, Sweden. Aurora chases, Sami dinners and photography tours in Norrbotten, Swedish Lapland — compared and ranked.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Alta, Norway (2026 / 2027) — Compared & Ranked | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/alta-northern-lights-tour/): The best Northern Lights tours in Alta, Norway — compared and ranked. Small-group chases, a heated bus tour, and a snowmobile night adventure across Scandinavia's Arctic north.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Lapland, Finland (2026 / 2027) — Rovaniemi & Levi | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/lapland-northern-lights-tour/): The best Northern Lights tours in Lapland, Finland. Guaranteed-sighting aurora chases, snowmobile trips and Santa Claus Village visits in Rovaniemi and Levi — compared and ranked.
[Best Northern Lights Tours from Reykjavik (2026 / 2027) — Day Trips Compared | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/reykjavik-northern-lights-tour/): The best Northern Lights day trips and tours from Reykjavik, Iceland's capital — compared and ranked. Bus tours, premium small groups, yacht cruises and 4x4 adventures.
[Best Northern Lights Tours in Tromsø (2026 / 2027) — Compared & Ranked | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/tours/tromso-northern-lights-tour/#tours): The best Northern Lights tours in Tromsø, compared and ranked. Photography, private car and snowmobile tours from Longyearbyen on the Spitsbergen archipelago — compared and ranked.

[About Us | Northern Borealis — Northern Lights Tour Experts](http://www.northern-borealis.com/legal/about/): Learn about Northern Borealis — an independent guide helping travellers find and book the best Northern Lights tours across Norway, Sweden and Finland.
[Affiliate Disclosure | Northern Borealis](http://www.northern-borealis.com/legal/affiliate-disclosure/): Northern Borealis affiliate disclosure. We independently recommend the best Northern Lights tours and may earn a commission if you book through our links — at no extra cost to you.

## Contact
